title: cistus hirsutus var. psilosepalus
intro: Cistus hirsutus var. psilosepalus, also known as rockrose, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cistus hirsutus var. psilosepalus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of rockrose can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
